description_long: This is a single athletic sneaker featuring a combination of blue, gray, pink, and white colors. The upper is primarily constructed from mesh and suede materials, with blue mesh on the toe box and side panels, and gray suede overlays. The shoe has a prominent blue 'N' logo outlined in white on the side, and a pink foam insole visible from the top. The midsole is white with a pink accent, and the outsole is made of black rubber with a rugged tread pattern for traction. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with blue laces, and the heel area includes additional blue and white detailing. Signs of dirt and wear are visible, indicating the shoe has been used outdoors.
description: A worn blue and gray athletic sneaker with a pink insole, blue 'N' logo, and rugged black sole. The shoe features mesh and suede materials with visible signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Top view showing the pink insole, blue laces, and the tongue with a pink logo; the shoe's interior and lace arrangement are clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large blue 'N' logo, gray suede overlays, and the layered midsole with pink and white accents.
description_view_2: Bottom view displaying the black rubber outsole with a rugged, multi-directional tread pattern and visible wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue mesh, gray suede, and additional heel support details, as well as the 'N' logo.
attribute_logo: Large blue 'N' with white outline on the side; pink 'NB' on the tongue; 'New Balance' text on the heel collar.
